headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Cummins Stock?
summary: Despite Cummins’ outperformance relative to the broader market over the past 52 weeks, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.

headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Announces $0.29 Per Share Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., May 21, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share of common stock, payable on June 17, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 3, 2026. This dividend payment represents a 3.6% increase to the quarterly cash dividend paid in June 2025.
